evals.prompt: What are the top stories on Hacker News right now?
evals.expected_output: Should use the topstories endpoint to fetch story IDs, then fetch details for each. Should present title, score, and URL for the top 10 stories. Should use curl with jq for filtering.
assertions: Fetches item details for each story ID

evals.prompt: Show me the best HN stories about AI and machine learning from today.
evals.expected_output: Should use the beststories or topstories endpoint, then filter results by title matching AI/GPT/LLM/Machine Learning keywords using jq select(). Should fetch enough stories (50+) to find relevant ones. Should present matching stories with score and title.
assertions: Filters stories by AI/ML keywords using jq
Fetches enough stories to find relevant results (50+)
Presents title and score for matching stories

evals.prompt: Get me the comments on the top HN story right now.
evals.expected_output: Should first fetch top story ID from topstories endpoint, then fetch story details to get kids (comment IDs), then fetch each top-level comment. Should present comment author and text for each top-level comment.
assertions: Fetches story details to get kids array
Fetches each top-level comment by ID

evals.prompt: Look up the HN profile for user 'pg'.
evals.expected_output: Should use the user endpoint with the username. Should present karma, account creation date (converted from Unix timestamp), bio, and number of submissions.

evals.prompt: What are the latest Ask HN posts?
evals.expected_output: Should use the askstories endpoint to fetch Ask HN story IDs, then fetch details for each. Should present title, score, and comment count (descendants) for the top Ask HN posts.
assertions: Fetches item details for each story ID

evals.prompt: Find me Show HN projects with over 100 upvotes.
evals.expected_output: Should use the showstories endpoint, fetch details for a batch of stories, and filter by score >= 100 using jq select(). Should present title, score, and URL for matching stories.
assertions: Fetches details for a reasonable batch of stories

evals.prompt: I want to post this on Bluesky: write a summary of the top 3 HN stories today.
evals.expected_output: Should fetch the top 3 stories from /v0/topstories.json with full details. Should then hand off to the social-content or bluesky skill to format the post. Should NOT attempt to post directly — that is outside the hackernews skill's scope.
assertions: Fetches top 3 stories with title, score, and URL
Recognizes posting to Bluesky is outside this skill's scope
Defers to the appropriate skill for social posting
Provides story data in a format useful for the other skill
